## 🎯 Action Items

### 🚨 Urgent
- **canart-bot #4 (P0 RCE):** Docker socket mounted into a root container = host takeover. canart-bot is actively shipping (06-08) on top of this unfixed hole. Assign to zwei919 / @PHY041 **now** — every new feature ships on a vulnerable base.
- **canart-bot #12 (P0 no-CI):** No test fixtures + no CI means every prompt change ships blind. This directly undermines the new card-draw / IG-publish features just merged.
